An Order To Show Cause Why Defendant Sheldon Fong Should Not Be Found In Contempt Of The Stipulated Order Entered On March 12, 2013
Off Calendar May-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael J. McLaughlin, Esq. (510-625-0100) for RWW Properties LLC, plaintiff / Brian K. Hilliard, Esq. (415-350-8842) for Sheldon Fong, defendant.

HEARING - Plaintiff's witness, Angela Marseguerra, is sworn to testify on behalf of plaintiff. Witnesses are examined. Arguments are heard from both sides. Court having heard the testimonies and oral arguments rules as follows: Defendant Sheldon Fong Is Found In Contempt Of The Stipulated Order Entered On March 12, 2013. Sanction in the amount of $750.00 and $500.00 for attorney's fees is awarded to plaintiff and its counsel. Plaintiff's counsel to prepare order approved as to form. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

An Order To Show Cause Why Defendant Sheldon Fong Should Not Be Found In Contempt Of The Stipulated Order Entered On March 12, 2013
Off Calendar May-15-2013 Continued To May-29-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael McLaughlin, Esq. for RWW Properties LLC, plaintiff and moving party / Brian Hilliard, Esq. (415-350-8842) for Sheldon Fong, defendant and opposing party

HEARING - Court hears arguments from both sides. Court grants plaintiff's request to continue the hearing to bring in the third party, Angela Marseguerra, either by appearing in court or court call appearance, to testify that defendant Sheldon Fong violated the order on entering the property. Court further orders the plaintiff's counsel to submit properly executed Declaration of Angela Marsequerra. Plaintiffs' Motion for Order to Show Cause why Defendant Fong should not be held in Contempt of Court is continued to May 29, 2013 at 9:30am in Dept. 501. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
